name: Iso11783OPOnAuxiliaryInput
title: Iso11783OPOnAuxiliaryInput
syntax: void Iso11783OPOnAuxiliaryInput( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword value1, dword value2 );
description: The function is called by the node layer, if an Auxiliary Input Status is received and a Auxiliary Function in the object pool is assigned.
